auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your shared expenses
auth.invitationMessage: Please contact a group admin to get an invitation.
auth.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists, we've sent a password reset email.
forgotPassword.errorMessage: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password
resetPassword.errorMessage: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
resetPassword.requirementsNotMet: Password does not meet all requirements

changePassword.title: Change your password
changePassword.subtitle: A temporary password was set for your account. Choose a new password to continue.
changePassword.successMessage: Your password has been changed. All previous sessions have been signed out.
changePassword.requirementsNotMet: Password does not meet all requirements
changePassword.errorMessage: Failed to change password. Please check your current password.
changePassword.noSession: No active session. Please sign in again.

verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email has been verified successfully.
verifyEmail.successAlert: You can now sign in to your account.
verifyEmail.passwordChangeMessage: You need to set a new password before continuing.
verifyEmail.passwordChangeAlert: Your account requires a password change.
verifyEmail.errorMessage: The verification link may have expired or already been used.

invitation.title: Accept invitation
invitation.subtitle: Create your account to join the group
invitation.errorMessage: Failed to accept invitation. The link may be invalid or expired.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Manage your security settings
security.mfaDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account

emptyStates.noEventsDesc: The pit is empty. Summon your first event.
emptyStates.noUsersDesc: No user accounts have been created yet
emptyStates.noActivityDesc: No recent activity to report. The survivors are resting.
emptyStates.noAuditEntriesDesc: No entries have been recorded yet.

placeholder.eventsDesc: Create an event to start tracking shared expenses
placeholder.expensesDesc: Add an expense to start tracking
